user_system_path: #481 FORMAT GAP fix: grounding silently dropped readable plaintext source. decryptWithStatus returns usedFallback=true for BOTH undecryptable ciphertext AND legacy plaintext rows; every evidence loader dropped on usedFallback alone, discarding 633 readable rows (11%) incl. 357 of 390 uploaded_document rows (resumes/packets/filings — richest source). Fix: shared looksLikeEncryptedPayload discriminator gates the drop so only true ciphertext is skipped; readable plaintext flows into grounding. Applied at fetchWinnerSignalEvidence + full-body hydration (generator.ts) + entity-trust-repair.ts. Additive — can only add real source, never remove. This is the highest-leverage grounding fix and needs NO paid run / NO prod access.
allowed_files_raw: lib/encryption.ts (new exported looksLikeEncryptedPayload), lib/briefing/generator.ts + lib/signals/entity-trust-repair.ts (gate the usedFallback drop on the discriminator), lib/__tests__/encryption.test.ts (new), generator-runtime mock export, docs/backend/AI_GROUNDING_FAITHFULNESS.md, control plane. No schema, no deps, no app/**.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**), no deps (package.json/lock), no app/**.
required_local_proof: npx vitest run lib/__tests__/encryption.test.ts lib/briefing/ lib/signals/ lib/outcome-autopsy/ && npm run typecheck && npm run gate:continuity && npm run build
required_browser_proof: N/A — backend grounding fix; the value path is the daily generation pipeline (verified by the unit suites + the live decrypt-rate measurement). A paid gen cycle confirms end-to-end, owner-side.
acceptance_condition: Readable plaintext signals (uploaded_document, AI-conversation exports) are no longer dropped from grounding; only true ciphertext is skipped; looksLikeEncryptedPayload unit-proven; full briefing+signals+autopsy suites + typecheck + build + gate:continuity green; additive (no row that previously grounded stops grounding).
anti_regression_checks: looksLikeEncryptedPayload true for long pure-base64, false for plaintext/empty/short
additive: encrypted-and-decryptable + previously-kept rows still ground; only adds plaintext rows
no app/**, no schema, no deps
stop_condition: Merge when green. Then between-rungs. Separate seams remain: generalize full-body hydration (needs fixture coherence + paid validation); verify prod ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY (24% key gap).
next_command: Owner: next seam options — (c) generalize full-body hydration; (a) prod ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY check; (d) one paid gen cycle now that grounding inputs are un-starved.
